description: Sovereignty-Bench-TW model registry. Each model has `provider` field (default: openrouter). Add new providers in scripts/bench/providers/. Add new models: see bench/MODEL_GUIDE.md

models.label: Owl Alpha (stealth)
models.note: Stealth model on OpenRouter (origin undisclosed during eval period). Validated 2026-05-01 γ-late as lang-sync main translator: high pass rate on Taiwan People prompts (LINE 4/4 ja), but γ-late observed hard policy refusal on Taiwan political topics (民主化 / 社會運動 / 二二八 / 國防). Bench 2026-05-02 to map refusal/reframe shape across A + D axes.

models.label: Llama 3.3 70B
models.note: Phase 1 100% rate-limited by Venice provider — Phase 2 needs paid endpoint.

prc-origin.label: PRC origin (free tier; ideological filter test)

local-ollama.label: Local Ollama (no spend, no rate limit, no API key)

models.label: Gemma4 31B (local)
models.note: 31B parameter Gemma4 via Ollama nvfp4 quant. 19GB. Reasoning model — may need higher max_tokens.

models.label: Qwen3.5 35B Coding (local)
models.note: Coding-tuned Qwen3.5 MoE 35B-A3B nvfp4 quant. 21GB. Smoke test 2026-05-01: empty content on general Q&A — coding-specific tuning may not engage on cultural prompts.

models.label: Qwen3.6 35B Coding (local)
models.note: Coding-tuned Qwen3.6 MoE 35B-A3B nvfp4 quant. Successor to 3.5; bench 2026-05-02 to test whether cross-version coding tune still strips general Q&A capability.

models.label: TAIDE Gemma3 12B (Taiwan fine-tune)
models.note: Taiwan-government-funded TAIDE project fine-tune of Gemma3 12B. Q4_K_M quant (8GB). Local baseline for Taiwan-aware open model.

judge.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6
judge.purpose: LLM judge for axis B reframe / D sovereignty / E granularity scoring; deterministic regex handles axis A; reference-answer comparison handles axis C
